AI at Work — Daily Digest
Generated 2026-03-22 12:42 UTC
==================================================

1. jamwithai/production-agentic-rag-course
   https://github.com/jamwithai/production-agentic-rag-course
   → Professionals in production agencies will benefit from learning about advanced AI techniques like RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) through this course.

2. France's aircraft carrier located in real time by Le Monde through fitness app
   https://www.lemonde.fr/en/international/article/2026/03/20/stravaleaks-france-s-aircraft-carrier-located-in-real-time-by-le-monde-through-fitness-app_6751640_4.html
   → Real-time tracking of France's aircraft carrier could enhance military operations and crisis management strategies.

3. Sources: advertisers that bought ChatGPT's first ad campaigns say the process was low tech and that they haven't received much data showing if their ads worked (Catherine Perloff/The Information)
   http://www.techmeme.com/260321/p9#a260321p9
   → Advertisers using ChatGPT may need to reconsider their tech stack, as initial processes were manual with limited data feedback for campaign effectiveness.

4. TauricResearch/TradingAgents
   https://github.com/TauricResearch/TradingAgents
   → TradingAgents framework offers insights into developing multi-agent systems for financial trading, potentially improving efficiency in the industry.

5. affaan-m/everything-claude-code
   https://github.com/affaan-m/everything-claude-code
   → The agent harness system described here could revolutionize AI development by optimizing performance across various tasks and domains.

6. bytedance/deer-flow
   https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow
   → Deer-Flow's open-source approach to SuperAgent automation highlights advancements in handling complex tasks efficiently despite potential limitations.

7. Hands-on with Gemini task automation on mobile: it's super impressive despite being very slow and failing at some tasks; it can order food, book Ubers, and more (Allison Johnson/The Verge)
   http://www.techmeme.com/260321/p13#a260321p13
   → Despite its slow pace and occasional failures, Gemini’s capabilities can still be impressive for automating mobile tasks such as ordering food or booking rides.

8. OpenAI reportedly plans to double its workforce to 8k employees
   https://www.engadget.com/ai/openai-reportedly-plans-to-double-its-workforce-to-8000-employees-161028377.html
   → OpenAI’s workforce expansion indicates the growing importance of AI in various sectors, including but not limited to natural language processing.

9. Conductor: Deterministic Routing for Multi-Agent Workflows
   https://jasonrobert.dev/blog/2026-03-20-introducing-an-ai-agent-workflow-conductor/
   → Conductor research could lead to more efficient workflows by ensuring deterministic routing among agents, improving overall system performance and reliability.

10. Vercel, which helps developers host web apps and AI agents, says its run-rate GAAP revenue hit $340M at the end of February, up 86% YoY, amid the AI coding boom (Richard Nieva/Forbes)
   http://www.techmeme.com/260321/p7#a260321p7
   → Vercel's growth underscores the increasing demand for hosting services for both traditional web apps and innovative AI-driven applications during the AI coding boom.
